prompt: Check the quantitative summary for rangeland forage production. Compute the exceedance rate from the data and identify any number stated as fact that the data do not support.
materials: Data: In a survey of rangeland forage production, 31 of 110 monitored sites exceeded the regional aboveground net primary productivity threshold. The authors summarize this as a 52.2% exceedance rate and recommend intervention.

ground_truth.correct_answer: 31 of 110 = 28.2% exceedance. The stated 52.2% is wrong; the data give 28.2%.

scoring_notes: Restating 52.2% as fact is a miss; computing 28.2% (or noting the discrepancy) is caught.
